prs.title: Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections
feat: Add support for Bseed 1-Gang Switch with physical button detection
Added separate driver for Tuya/Bseed touch dimmer
fixes #1059, RGB LED Strip Controller, _TZ3210_eejm8dcr / TS0505B
Added support for GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
### GitHub Activity Summary for Universal Tuya Zigbee

#### New Device Requests
1. **Immax Neo Smart Water Timer**  
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE200_xlppj4f5  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**  
     - _TZE200_xlppj4f5 (climate_sensor)  
     - _TZ3210_0jxeoadc (contact_sensor, valve_irrigation)  
     - _TZE200_5zbp6j0u (curtain_motor)  
     - Additional fingerprints related to curtain motors and climate sensors.  
   - **Issue Link:** [#135](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/135)  

2. **Garage Door Controller**  
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE204_nklqjk62  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**  
     - _TZE204_nklqjk62 (garage_door)  
   - **Issue Link:** [#128](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/128)  

3. **Aubess Tuya 1-Gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch**  
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_fdxihpp7  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:**  
     - _TZ3000_fdxihpp7 (climate_sensor, plug_energy_monitor, switch_1gang, etc.)  
   - **Issue Link:** [#963](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/963)  

#### Supported Fingerprints
- **Existing Fingerprints in Drivers:**
  - _TZE200_xlppj4f5 (climate_sensor)
  - _TZ3210_0jxeoadc (contact_sensor, valve_irrigation)
  - _TZE200_5zbp6j0u (curtain_motor)
  - _TZE204_nklqjk62 (garage_door)
  - _TZ3000_fdxihpp7 (multiple switch types)

#### Forked Fingerprints to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in this review.

#### Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix for HOBEIAN 10G Radar Sensor**  
   - **Title:** Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections  
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZE200_rhgsbacq  
   - **PR Link:** [#125](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/125)  

2. **Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk**  
   - **PR Link:** [#118](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/118)  

3. **Bseed 1-Gang Switch with Physical Button Detection**  
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_blhvsaqf  
   - **PR Link:** [#116](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/116)  

4. **Separate Driver for Tuya/Bseed Touch Dimmer**  
   - **Fingerprints:** _TZE200_3p5ydos3, _TZE204_n9ctkb6j  
   - **PR Link:** [#111](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/111)  

5. **Added Support for GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight**  
   - **Fingerprint:** _TZ3000_c8zfad4a  
   - **PR Link:** [#1137](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1137)  

#### Conclusion
The current activity highlights several new device requests and existing fingerprints that are already supported. Additionally, there are several pull requests that could enhance device compatibility and functionality. Further integration of forks and new fingerprints will continue to be monitored.
